root_cause_summary: The contract referenced a rate card that was not active for the requested contract start date.
root_cause_details: The rate card ID existed, but its active period did not cover the requested starting_at timestamp.
resolution_summary: Selected the active rate card for the contract start date and resubmitted the contract request.
resolution_steps: Checked the rate card active period.
Compared the active period with the contract starting_at timestamp.
Updated the contract to reference an active rate card.
verification_steps: Verify the rate card is active on the contract start date.
Verify the contract uses the active rate card.
verification_results: The replacement rate card was active for the requested date.
The contract used the active rate card and priced successfully.
